title: ANC Indicators
description: A simple mod that adds various alphabetic, numeric, and color-based indicators. Also featuring a custom-made Automatic Universal ReColoring System, aka the AURCS.
body:
**ANC Indicators, short for Alphabetic + Numeric + Color Indicators, is a mod which aims to help with organization and channel management for mods that have such, by adding various indicators for colors of blocks, alphabetic sorting, or numeric values.**

What originally started in concept as a simple mod for adding blocks and items visually representing all numbers and letters, originally called AlphaNumeric Indicators, it gradually ballooned in scope.

Now it features indicators for:

• Every letter of the (english) **Alphabet**

• **Numeric** values 0 through 16, as well as for: 32, 64, 1000, Infinity, Even, Odd, and basic math

• Every **Block Color**, as in what colors blocks can be dyed

• Every **Text Color**, with their respective dark backgrounds to differentiate them from Block Colors

• **Redstone Levels**, each of which output their respective signal strength corresponding to their numeric value

• **Light Levels**, similar to the Redstone Levels, but output light

It took a lot of work as i challenged myself to not reference any existing mods, but I also implemented a fancy **Automatic Universal ReColoring System**, aka the AURCS! The vials of paint you can craft have been coded to automatically get their own color and the color of the targeted block and change the color of the block! Nothing manually inputted into the code, all detected and used, so should be nearly universal in usage no matter what mods' blocks are being recolored!

And I was having so much fun making this mod, that i went ahead and added decorative blocks of the basic blank indicator and the darkened version, because i ended up liking how they looked just as a texture. (slabs, stairs, doors, trapdoors, and pressure plates, to be specific)
